message:
test(e2e): add extension install/update/resolve/execute E2E workflow test (bd-gz6)

Add comprehensive E2E test that validates the full extension package
lifecycle — install from local source, install from npm, update, manifest
resolution, and command execution — all running offline via stub npm/git:

e2e_cli_extensions_install_update_manifest_resolution_offline:
- Installs a local extension package with a custom command registration
- Installs a remote (npm:) extension package via offline npm stub
- Runs package update and verifies npm reinstall of unpinned packages
- Validates PackageManager.resolve_with_roots() discovers both extensions
  with correct source metadata and enabled state
- Starts JsExtensionRuntimeHandle, loads both extensions, and executes
  their registered commands verifying return values
- Captures structured JSONL logs with extension_id, install_source,
  version, and scenario_id fields per the bd-4u9 logging requirements
- All test infrastructure (CliTestHarness, offline stubs, ResolveRoots
  helper, run_async executor, write_jsonl_artifacts) added as reusable
  helpers for future extension E2E tests

This advances bd-gz6 (E2E extension install/update workflow) which was
previously in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
